name: dependency-check-updates
description: dcu — multi-ecosystem dependency check & update tool

scripts.build: cargo build --release && bun --workspaces run build && cd bridge/python && maturin build --release
scripts.build:dev: cargo build && cd bridge/node && bun x napi build --platform && cd ../.. && cd bridge/python && maturin develop
scripts.lint: cargo clippy -- -D warnings && cargo fmt --check && bun --workspaces lint
scripts.check: bun run lint && bun run test
